title: Amarite
body: ![Amarite Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ftofxBty/images/b5abb92484fc27873321f8e4d6af94d474bcb80c.png) #### Amarite adds a new material to the game, Amarite! --- This can be used to make various new items such as; - The Amarite Longsword A new sword which allows you to dash. - The Amarite Discs A trio of discs which you can throw at enemies. - The Amarite Mirror A mirror which can hold the power of a beacon or conduit and use it at a later time. As well as other features such as a way to grow budding amethyst, beacon activation using tinted glass, and a way of poisoning food. --- #### [Check out Winsweep's video!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EXyH8JaxDhA&t 'Title')
